sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current green blocks
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
green_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"Green blocks remaining: {len(green_nodes)}")
for n in green_nodes:
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    print(f"  rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Player position
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"\nPlayer: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
